summary: Review points out incorrect set‑list metadata; no information on audio or performance quality
review: The sole reviewer flags that the track listing appears to belong to a different show (9‑14‑93) and suggests files may be misplaced. No comments are made about the recording’s sound quality or the musical performance, leaving those aspects indeterminate.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review with a 0‑star rating and no substantive discussion of music or sound quality; rating reflects the reviewer’s dissatisfaction with metadata.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No remarks on audio clarity, mix, or source type – reviewer only mentioned set‑list inaccuracies.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer indicates the posted set list is likely wrong and may belong to a different date; no assessment of musical flow.
